summary: Security fix verification complete: Tenants can NO longer create super_admin accounts. Backend API tests (10/10 passed) confirm all security controls are working. Frontend code review confirms super_admin is excluded from role dropdowns in both SettingsPage.js and UsersPage.js.
critical_code_review_comments: BACKEND: /api/users POST correctly blocks super_admin role for non-super_admin users (lines 720-728)
BACKEND: /api/users PUT correctly blocks role change to super_admin for non-super_admin users (lines 762-770)
BACKEND: /api/users PUT correctly prevents non-super_admin from modifying super_admin accounts (lines 772-777)
FRONTEND: SettingsPage.js availableRoles array (lines 677-687) does NOT contain super_admin
FRONTEND: UsersPage.js roles array (lines 62-72) does NOT contain super_admin
Security checks are case-insensitive (forbidden_roles check uses .lower())

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - super_admin excluded from all role dropdowns

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing test data for security validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security vulnerability fixed and fully tested. 3 backend endpoints secured (register, create_user, update_user), 2 frontend files updated (SettingsPage.js, UsersPage.js). All pytest tests pass confirming the fix works correctly.

security_tests_summary.test_create_user_with_super_admin_role_b: PASS - User creation blocked for non-super_admin
security_tests_summary.test_update_user_to_super_admin_role_by_: PASS - Role update blocked for non-super_admin

verified_security_controls.POST /api/auth/register: Blocks super_admin, saas_admin, superadmin roles with 403
verified_security_controls.POST /api/users: Only super_admin can create super_admin users, others get 403
verified_security_controls.PUT /api/users/{id}: Only super_admin can assign super_admin role, others get 403
